## What this changes
A short description of the change and why.

## Type
- [ ] New check / detector
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Other

## Proof
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] If a new check: it catches a real gap on a fixture and does NOT false-flag the correct case
- [ ] If touching the engine: ran an audit against a real app and reviewed the report

## Notes for reviewers
Anything that needs context, or follow-ups intentionally left out of scope.
